description: Agent uses get_current_time tool for a time query
input: What is the current UTC time? Use the get_current_time tool.

description: Agent fetches a URL and extracts content from the response
input: Fetch https://httpbin.org/json using the http_fetch tool and tell me what top-level JSON fields it contains.

description: Agent uses file_read tool for a file query
input: Read the file /etc/hostname using the file_read tool and tell me what it contains.

description: Agent stores a fact using the remember tool
input: Please remember the following fact using the remember tool: 'The eval suite version is 1.0'.

description: Agent retrieves stored memories using the recall tool
input: Use the recall tool to check if you have any memory about the eval suite version.

description: Main agent delegates a network task to the researcher sub-agent
input: Use the delegate_to_researcher agent to fetch https://httpbin.org/uuid and report back the UUID value it returns.
